/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/mia_backend.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mia_backend.dir/src/api/Server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mia_backend.dir/src/parser/CommandRunner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mia_backend.dir/src/disk/BinaryIO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mia_backend.dir/src/commands/MkDisk.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mia_backend.dir/src/commands/RmDisk.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mia_backend.dir/src/commands/FdDisk.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mia_backend.dir/src/disk/MountManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mia_backend.dir/src/commands/MountCmd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mia_backend.dir/src/commands/RepCmd.cpp.o -o mia_backend
